mapper.select:
SELECT ORG_CD, ORG_NM, ORG_STS_SE, ORD, USE_YN, CRT_BY, CRT_IP, CRT_PGM, TO_CHAR(CRT_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CRT_AT, UPD_BY, UPD_IP, UPD_PGM, TO_CHAR(UPD_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPD_AT FROM CMS_COM_ORG
AND (ORG_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' OR ORG_CD LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' )
AND USE_YN = #{useYn}
ORDER BY ORD, ORG_CD

SELECT ORG_CD, ORG_NM, ORG_STS_SE, ORD, USE_YN, CRT_BY, CRT_IP, CRT_PGM, TO_CHAR(CRT_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CRT_AT, UPD_BY, UPD_IP, UPD_PGM, TO_CHAR(UPD_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPD_AT FROM CMS_COM_ORG WHERE ORG_CD = #{orgCd}
mapper.update:
UPDATE CMS_COM_ORG SET ORG_NM = #{vo.orgNm}, ORG_STS_SE = #{vo.orgStsSe}, ORD = #{vo.ord}, USE_YN = COALESCE(#{vo.useYn}, USE_YN),
WHERE ORG_CD = #{orgCd}
